notes: Optional .tp/ layer: ProjectConfig (committed) + LocalConfig (git-ignored) modeled.
ResolveWorkflowLayers layers project under task override at read time; no copying.
No .tp/ discovered -> override over built-in defaults, v0.23.0 behavior.
tp validate --project reports per-file workflow drift across scan.
Active pointer folded into .tp/local.json via tp use; legacy .tp-active kept as fallback.
ProjectConfig holds single workflow key; doc states MUST be committed.
LocalConfig holds active + defaults; doc states MUST NOT be committed.
EnsureTPGitignore idempotently creates/appends local.json entry; called by every .tp/ write.
Each loader independent; missing file returns empty config (== empty object).
DiscoverTPDir walks upward from start incl anchor and boundary, stops at first .tp/.
hasGitBoundary matches .git dir or file; walk halts after testing boundary dir or root.
Resolution anchored at working dir ("."), never re-anchored to a --file directory.
No .tp/ -> built-in defaults and per-task settings as in v0.23.0.
ProjectRoot = dir containing .tp/, else git boundary, else abs(start).
config.json workflow parsed with same field set as task workflow block.
local.json parses active (string) and defaults (object of booleans).
Unknown top-level, workflow, and defaults keys all warn and skip; the fixed defaults-key path is lines 187-190.
Wrong-typed active/defaults/workflow values warn on stderr and are left unset.
clampWorkflowRanges unsets out-of-range values to built-in default and warns.

MalformedConfigError (non-object/invalid JSON/unreadable) aborts reading commands with exit 3 + repair-or-delete hint; note resolution helpers (projectWorkflowOverride) are documented best-effort and swallow it on gate/budget paths.
Config warnings/errors written to stderr; JSON stays on stdout.
Rank-1 CLI flags (--file/--compact/--no-compact/--color/--no-color) win over lower layers.
Rank-2 env: NO_COLOR below explicit flags; TP_FILE handled in discovery chain.
Rank-3 task-file override outranks project layer per field.
Rank-4 project (.tp/config.json) / project-local defaults sit below overrides.
Rank-5 DefaultWorkflow built-in defaults are the lowest layer.
Per-field pickInt/pickString/pickChecks sparse merge inherits absent fields from project.
Only no_color has NO_COLOR env peer; compact/quiet resolve CLI/local/default.
active resolved by discovery chain (§7.1), not the workflow ladder.
Pointer fields presence-track; review_max_rounds:0 distinct from absent.
A present (non-nil) field wins regardless of value; nil inherits lower layer.
pickChecks replace semantics: any present slice (incl empty) wins; only absent inherits.
set --workflow --project writes workflow block via ProjectConfigDir (git boundary/cwd).
Reuses workflowFieldRange; out-of-range values rejected with exit 1 (ExitValidation).
Project quality_gate is authorable (not read-only unlike per-task).
set --local defaults.<flag>=<bool>; unknown flag/non-bool rejected exit 1; creates .tp/ + flock.
Import/gate/budget checks read resolved (project-layered) values, not raw task block.
ResolveWorkflow layers project under task override so thinned file inherits caps.
tp config prints resolved JSON; missing task file yields project layer alone, exit 0.
--resolved emits {value,source}; workflow=override/project/default, active=cli/env/local/legacy/autodetect, defaults=local.
tp config always emits JSON; --compact is a documented no-op.
local.json active (project-root-relative) sits ahead of legacy .tp-active in chain.
tp use stores rel path in local.json; outside-root rejected exit 2; no .tp-active written.
use --clear removes active key, no-op exit 0 when unset, also removes legacy .tp-active.
tp use no-arg prints resolved active_file + source rank and reports dangling pointer.
Missing active file warns on stderr and continues discovery rather than aborting.
Absolute or root-escaping active rejected with warning and treated as unset.
Legacy .tp-active read from CWD as lower-priority fallback + deprecation warning naming tp use.
local.json active checked before .tp-active, so project-local wins when both exist.
Deprecation warning documents removal in v0.25.0; no v0.24.0 code change required.
defaults supplies compact/quiet/no_color when flag absent; --json intentionally excluded.
Negating flags --no-compact/--no-quiet/--color registered; explicit flag wins in flag_defaults.
no_color order: --color/--no-color, NO_COLOR, defaults.no_color, then TTY detection.
Flag + its negation together is a usage error, exit 2 (ExitUsage).
Reports per-file {file,field,override,project} for each deviating workflow field.
Deviation requires both override and project non-nil, so unset project fields aren't reported.
checksEqual is multiset/set comparison; deviation reported as N vs M entries, not scalar.
Deviations exit 0 by default; --strict with deviations exits 1 (ExitValidation).
No .tp/config.json -> reports project_config:false and exits 0.
ScanProjectTaskFiles walks from project root collecting all *.tasks.json recursively; shared by validate --project and config --extract.
Skips .git/.tp/node_modules/vendor and nested submodules (subdir with own .git).
Recursive project scan distinct from discover.go single-file auto-detect (dir + one level).
validate --project skips malformed files with stderr warning; config --extract aborts exit 3 (config_extract.go 150-160).
No .tp/ -> byte-for-byte v0.23.0 behavior; no migration on upgrade.
Adoption opt-in: create config by hand or run --extract; nothing auto-rewritten.
Hoists quality_gate/checks/ints only when all files identical, then strips hoisted fields; nothing common -> nothing hoisted, exit 0.
--dry-run prints plan; dirty tree exit 4; existing config exit 4 unless --force merge; --force never bypasses dirty gate; flock held.
Full workflow blocks still parse as overrides; every explicit field wins until thinned.
Exactly two workflow layers (project + per-task); no N-level include chain.
Config anchored once at working dir; a --file into another project still resolves against cwd config.
Only project + built-in layers exist; no ~/.config/tp user-home layer introduced.
Feature adds only the config/resolution layer; task/coverage/review/audit semantics unchanged.
ProjectConfig/LocalConfig/WorkflowOverride modeled; absent==empty via nil fields; model test present.
Upward walk incl anchor+boundary, halts at git boundary/root; projectconfig_test covers it.
ProjectRoot: .tp/ dir else git boundary else cwd; anchored at start, no --file re-anchor.
EnsureTPGitignore creates/appends local.json entry idempotently on every .tp/ write.
Presence-tracked workflow parse + active/defaults parse; projectconfig_test covers it.
Unknown keys (all 3 levels, incl fixed defaults path 187-190) and type mismatches warn and fall back to inherited/built-in.
clampWorkflowRanges resets out-of-range to built-in (600/0/2) with stderr warning at read time.
MalformedConfigError aborts reading commands exit 3 + repair-or-delete hint; {} valid; warnings on stderr.
pick* helpers apply override>project>default; active resolved by discovery chain.
Per-field sparse merge; flag_defaults.go 48-62 shows only no_color has env peer. configresolve_test SparseMerge.
Presence (non-nil) defines override; checks replace semantics incl empty array. Test PresenceZeroWins/ChecksReplace.
Resolve-at-read two-layer (project+task) under CLI/env; anchored at cwd, no cross-project.
Import convergence uses ResolveWorkflow resolved clean-rounds; thinned file inherits project cap. import_enforce_test present.
Gate uses EffectiveWorkflowForTaskFile so a task omitting quality_gate runs project gate. donegate/gate tests present.
Review/audit budget caps read from ResolveWorkflow resolved values; thinned file inherits project caps. configresolve_test BudgetCapsInherited.
Prints {workflow:...} JSON; project-only when no task file; --compact no-op.
--resolved annotates value+source; workflow override/project/default, active chain ranks, defaults=local.
Writes workflow to config.json via ProjectConfigDir (git boundary/cwd); flock held. set_project_test present.
Same ranges rejected exit 1; quality_gate authorable at project level.
Writes defaults to local.json, creates .tp/ + .gitignore, flock held. set_local_test present.
Flag must be compact/quiet/no_color and value true/false; else exit 1.
Chain: --file > TP_FILE > local.json active > legacy .tp-active > auto-detect. configresolve_test LocalActiveOverLegacy.

Behavior fully correct (setActiveFile stores project-root-relative in local.json, rejects outside-root exit 2, writes no .tp-active). But newUseCmd Long/Example help text still says 'Writes a .tp-active marker in CWD' / 'tp use --clear # remove .tp-active', contradicting spec 7.1.2. Stale user-facing docs only.
Removes active key, no-op exit 0 when unset, also removes legacy .tp-active. use_active_test present.
No-arg prints resolved active_file + source rank; reports dangling pointer.
Dangling active warns and falls through chain; escape/absolute rejected (configresolve.go 31-40); use no-arg reports it (use.go 87-90).
Legacy .tp-active read from CWD only, deprecation warning names tp use; local value wins; removal v0.25.0 documented.
compact/quiet/no_color defaults applied when flag absent; --json excluded. Wired via root.go PersistentPreRun. flag_defaults_test present.
Negating flags force off overriding defaults; flag+negation conflict exits 2; registered in root.go 50-52.
no_color order: explicit flag, NO_COLOR env, defaults.no_color, TTY detection.
Collects every *.tasks.json from project root recursively, sorted; shared discovery rule. scan_test present.
Skips .git/.tp/node_modules/vendor + nested submodules; validate skips malformed, extract aborts exit 3.
Reports each field override differing from an explicitly-set project value; unset project fields not reported. validate_project_test present.
checks compared as set; reordered-equal not a deviation; reported as N vs M entries.
Exit 0 default; --strict promotes deviations to exit 1; no config -> report + exit 0.
Hoists field (incl quality_gate + checks set-eq) only when all files identical, then strips from each. config_extract_test present.
Nothing common -> writes nothing, reports nothing-to-hoist, exit 0; malformed mid-scan aborts exit 3.
--dry-run prints plan without writing; dirty git tree refused exit 4; non-repo skips check + warns.
Existing config exit 4 unless --force (mergeCommon overwrites only hoisted keys); --force never bypasses dirty gate; flock held.
TestResolveEffectiveWorkflow_NoConfigIsV023 proves zero-config == v0.23.0; legacy marker still honored (discover_test).
Untouched repo (NoConfigIsV023) + thinned-then-resolved (SparseMerge/ThinnedTaskInheritsProjectPolicy) exercised.
TestResolveEffectiveWorkflow_AnchoredAtStartNoCrossProject confirms no cross-project resolution; only two layers exist (no user-home config).
git via exec.Command arg-vector (no shell), paths via filepath.Join, WithFileLock paired release, WriteProjectConfig is 0o600, dir 0o755.
No file writes or locks; json.Marshal of a fully-controlled map with ignored err is standard. Gate cmd is author-configured by design.
Paths via filepath.Join; LoadReviewState/SpecHash errors handled; ignored ResolveWorkflow return is warnings, not error.
Command wiring only; no file writes, locks, or exec; Execute prints error and exits.
Flag validated against allowlist, bool restricted to true/false; WithFileLock paired release; WriteLocalConfig 0o600.
Checks JSON-validated + ValidateChecks, integers range-checked before use; WithFileLock; WriteProjectConfig 0o600.
Path-traversal guard rejects targets outside project root (filepath.Rel + '..' prefix); WithFileLock paired release; WriteLocalConfig 0o600; os.Remove err checked.
Read-only validate; Discover/ReadTaskFile/output errors all handled and exit-coded; no writes, locks, or exec.
Best-effort report; malformed task files skipped with warning, not crash; paths via filepath.Join; no writes or locks.
ResolveLocalActive rejects absolute + root-escaping active paths (filepath.Rel + '..' prefix); read-only; config load errors handled best-effort.

New unknown-defaults-key warning is an allowlist check (knownDefaultFlags) that strengthens input validation; concat only builds warning text, not paths/queries. All writes 0o600 (236/262/278/292/306), dirs 0o755; malformed JSON aborts via MalformedConfigError. No regression.
All helpers doc-commented; MalformedConfigError handled via errors.As with hint (107-113); camelCase naming; gofmt clean; no TODO.

All funcs doc-commented; errors.As for malformed configs (152-157,201-206); terminal errors exit (no %w propagation needed). runConfigExtract ~88 lines incl. flock closure, within soft ~80; unchanged, round 2 clean.
applyFlagDefaults doc-commented, ~46 lines; camelCase; gofmt clean; no TODO.
All funcs/consts/struct doc-commented; every func under 80 lines; json.Marshal of known map ignored per established pattern; no TODO.
enforceImportConvergence doc-commented, ~37 lines; errors routed to exitStateError; descriptive naming; no TODO.

gofmt clean, no TODO, camelCase. Exported NewRootCmd/Execute/accessors lack doc comments, but this is pre-existing (+0/-0, round 2 clean) and consistent with the codebase cobra-constructor/accessor pattern; not a regression from the projectconfig fix.
runSetLocal + localDefaultFlags doc-commented; ~70 lines; errors.As for malformed config (69-77); no TODO. localDefaultFlags mirrors engine knownDefaultFlags (different layer), acceptable.
runSetProjectWorkflow doc-commented; errors.As handling (91-98); gofmt clean; no TODO. ~114 lines incl. flock closure over soft ~80, but unchanged (+0/-0) and round 2 clean; no regression.
Helper funcs doc-commented; all under 80 lines; errors.As for malformed local config; descriptive naming; no TODO.
runValidate ~30 lines; standard error-exit pattern; camelCase; gofmt clean; no TODO.
